description: MCP server that exposes the okama investment portfolio toolkit (backtesting, Monte Carlo forecasts, efficient frontier, asset search) to AI assistants such as Claude Desktop, Claude Code, and Cursor
rules: Install with 'uvx okama-mcp stdio' or 'pipx install okama-mcp'; requires Python >= 3.11
Use the stdio transport for local MCP clients (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor) and streamable-http for self-hosting
